title: Apollo Telehealth Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Telehealth Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Apollo Telehealth Capital India family as a Full Stack Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!
